30.reason: The queue uses pre-increment on rear, but rear is initialized to -1, so the first element is stored at index 0. However, the queue capacity is not checked properly; if the queue is full, it will overflow.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Error: Should be queue->items[++(queue->rear)] but rear starts at -1, so first enqueue sets items[0] correctly; however, no bounds check on rear]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  The queue uses pre-increment on rear, but rear is initialized to -1, so the first element is stored at index 0. However, the queue capacity is not checked properly; if the queue is full, it will overflow.

180.reason: This only removes edges from toRemove to other vertices, but does not remove the vertex itself from the adjacency list. The vertex toRemove still exists in the graph, and its adjacency list is not cleared, which may cause incorrect traversal after deletion.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Error: This only removes edges from toRemove to i, but does not remove edges from i to toRemove; also, the loop condition should remove all edges incident to toRemove, but the logic is inverted]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  This only removes edges from toRemove to other vertices, but does not remove the vertex itself from the adjacency list. The vertex toRemove still exists in the graph, and its adjacency list is not cleared, which may cause incorrect traversal after deletion.
